title: vicia × tikeliana
intro: Vicia × tikeliana, also known as the garden pea trefoil or vetch, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Vicia sativa (common vetch) and Vicia tenuifolia (tickle me not). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which can help in reducing inflammation and improving immune response. The health benefits of Vicia × tikeliana include its potential to act as an antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant, making it useful in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Vicia × tikeliana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its medicinal and health benefits.
